-- Lust manaleech (low priority; only when nothing else to do) if (not _has100("manaleech")) and _cd_ok("ruinate_lovers", C.cfg.cds.ruinate_lovers) then _cd_mark("ruinate_lovers") local payload = ("ruinate lovers at %s"):format(t) return SEND(C.cfg.q_bal, payload) end
return false end -- end limb route
--======================================================== -- AFF ROUTE (original planner) --========================================================
-- 1) Establish asthma (EQ) if not _has100("asthma") and _cd_ok("instill", C.cfg.cds.instill) then _cd_mark("instill") local payload = ("instill %s with asthma"):format(t)
-- opportunistic addiction rider (entity) if ready if _entity_ready() and (not _has100("addiction")) and _cd_ok("humbug", C.cfg.cds.humbug) then _cd_mark("humbug") payload = payload .. sep .. ("command humbug at %s"):format(t) end
return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end
--======================================================== -- NEW: Paralysis/Slickness maintenance (your requested logic) --========================================================
-- A) If asthma+slickrness present but paralysis missing: if _has100("asthma") and _has100("slickness") and (not _has100("paralysis")) then if _entity_ready() and _cd_ok("slime", C.cfg.cds.slime) then _cd_mark("slime") local eqfill = _eq_filler(t, mana) local payload = ("command slime at %s"):format(t) if eqfill ~= "" then payload = payload .. sep .. eqfill end return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) else -- entity NOT ready: instill paralysis && <secondary filler> if _cd_ok("instill", C.cfg.cds.instill) then _cd_mark("instill") local payload = ("instill %s with paralysis"):format(t) local sec = _secondary_filler(t, mana) if sec ~= "" then payload = payload .. sep .. sec return SEND(C.cfg.q_bal, payload) -- secondary may be BAL end return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end end end
-- B) Elseif asthma+paralysis present but slickness missing: if _has100("asthma") and _has100("paralysis") and (not _has100("slickness")) then if _entity_ready() and _cd_ok("bubonis", C.cfg.cds.bubonis) then _cd_mark("bubonis") local eqfill = _eq_filler(t, mana) local payload = ("command bubonis at %s"):format(t) if eqfill ~= "" then payload = payload .. sep .. eqfill end return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end end
--======================================================== -- Existing planner logic (kept) --========================================================
-- 2) Establish slickness via Bubonis followup once asthma exists (fallback, even without paralysis) if _has100("asthma") and (not _has100("slickness")) and _entity_ready() and _cd_ok("bubonis", C.cfg.cds.bubonis) then _cd_mark("bubonis") local payload = ("command bubonis at %s"):format(t) return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end
-- 3) Build asthma stability (bury) if needed: push additional kelp-cured affs if _has100("asthma") and (not _asthma_stable()) and _cd_ok("instill", C.cfg.cds.instill) then local want = (not _has100("clumsiness") and "clumsiness") or (not _has100("sensitivity") and "sensitivity") or (not _has100("healthleech") and "healthleech") or (not _has100("weariness") and "weariness") if want then _cd_mark("instill") local payload = ("instill %s with %s"):format(t, want)
if _entity_ready() and (not _has100("addiction")) and _cd_ok("humbug", C.cfg.cds.humbug) then _cd_mark("humbug") payload = payload .. sep .. ("command humbug at %s"):format(t) end
return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end end
-- 4) Establish manaleech (BAL) if (not _has100("manaleech")) and _cd_ok("ruinate_lovers", C.cfg.cds.ruinate_lovers) and _asthma_stable() then _cd_mark("ruinate_lovers") local payload = ("ruinate lovers at %s"):format(t)
if _entity_ready() and _cd_ok("bubonis", C.cfg.cds.bubonis) then _cd_mark("bubonis") payload = payload .. sep .. ("command bubonis at %s"):format(t) end
return SEND(C.cfg.q_bal, payload) end
-- 5) Optional: create a guaranteed ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã…â€œ1 limb progressedÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â gate via SHRIVEL + CRONE (preferred legs) if _asthma_stable() and _has100("manaleech") and _broken_count() == 0 and _cd_ok("shrivel", C.cfg.cds.shrivel) then _cd_mark("shrivel") local payload = ("shrivel left leg %s"):format(t) .. sep .. ("command crone at %s right leg"):format(t) return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end
-- 6) Conservative AEON spike if _aeon_gate(t) and (not _has100("aeon")) then local now = _now()
if (Yso and type(Yso.speed)=="function" and Yso.speed(t) == true) and (now - (ts.last_pinchaura or 0)) >= (C.cfg.cds.pinchaura or 4.0) then ts.last_pinchaura = now _cd_mark("pinchaura") return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, ("pinchaura %s speed"):format(t)) end
if (now - (ts.last_aeon or 0)) >= (C.cfg.cds.aeon or 3.0) then ts.last_aeon = now local payload = ("outd aeon%sfling aeon at %s"):format(sep, t) if _entity_ready() and _cd_ok("bubonis", C.cfg.cds.bubonis) then _cd_mark("bubonis") payload = ("command bubonis at %s"):format(t) .. sep .. payload end return SEND(C.cfg.q_bal, payload) end end
-- 7) ENERVATE pressure at <= 60% (EQ) if mana_known and mana <= (C.cfg.enervate_start or 60) and mana > (C.cfg.cleanse_at or 39) then if _cd_ok("enervate", C.cfg.cds.enervate) then _cd_mark("enervate") return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, ("enervate %s"):format(t)) end end
-- 8) Justice mid-route spike (BAL) ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â use your >=4 fuel rule in your main module later -- (left as-is here; you said you want Justice at 4+ but we are keeping this clock module minimal.) -- If we didn't send anything, do nothing (no standalone readaura).
return false end
function C.tick(arg) if not C.cfg.enabled then return false end local t = _resolve_target(arg, false) if t == "" then return false end if not (_vit_eq() or _vit_bal()) then return false end return C.plan_and_fire(t) == true end
function C.toggle(arg) C.cfg.enabled = not C.cfg.enabled if Yso and Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.wake)=="function" then Yso.pulse.wake("cleanseaura:toggle") end
local tgt = "" if C.cfg.enabled then tgt = _resolve_target(arg, true)
local ts = _tstate(tgt) ts.lim_worm_primed = false ts.lim_syc_primed = false ts.worm_until = 0 ts.sycophant_until = 0
if tgt ~= "" then _clock_loyals_on(tgt) end else tgt = _resolve_target("", false) _clock_loyals_off() end
if C.cfg.echo_toggle and cecho then if C.cfg.enabled then cecho(string.format("<dark_orchid>[Occultism] <aquamarine>clock ON<reset> vs %s (route: %s).\n", (tgt ~= "" and tgt or "?"), (C.cfg.route or "aff"))) else cecho("<dark_orchid>[Occultism] <yellow>clock OFF<reset>.\n") end end
if C.cfg.enabled then C.tick() end end
function C.firelord_ack(tgt) -- ACK hook for "Pyradius conversions" trigger ("You command your firelord ... Pyradius ..."). -- This is primarily a timestamp latch for future routing; it is safe/no-op otherwise. C.state = C.state or {} C.state.last_pyradius = (type(getEpoch) == "function" and getEpoch()) or os.time()
if C.cfg and C.cfg.debug and cecho then cecho(string.format("<gray>[clock] Pyradius ACK vs %s.\n", tostring(tgt or "?"))) end end
-- Pulse driver (replaces GMCP driver) if Yso and Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.register)=="function" then Yso.pulse.register("cleanseaura", function() if C and C.cfg and C.cfg.enabled then C.tick() end end, {order = -10}) end
--========================================================-- -- end clock module --========================================================--

Script.name: Yso.state
Script.script:
--========================================================-- -- Yso.state ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â Canonical Blackboard (Phase 1 plumbing) -- -- Goals: -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ Single source of truth for *facts* (GMCP + triggers + parsers). -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ Friendly for event-driven automation (dirty mask + timestamps). -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ Backwards compatible with Spine v1 readers (me/tgt/meta). -- -- Schema (high level): -- Yso.state.meta : bookkeeping (dirty, ticks, wake reasons) -- Yso.state.self : my vitals/affs/flags (aka "me") -- Yso.state.target : current combat target pointer (name/key/present) -- Yso.state.opp : per-opponent cache keyed by lower(name) -- Yso.state.sensors: readaura, prompt, etc -- Yso.state.queue : queue model + lane readiness mirror -- -- Compatibility: -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ Yso.state.me aliases self (subset) -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ Yso.state.tgt aliases current target cache entry (subset) --========================================================--
Yso = Yso or {} Yso.state = Yso.state or {}
-- ---------- tiny utils ---------- local function _now() if type(getEpoch) == "function" then local t = tonumber(getEpoch()) or os.time() -- Some setups return ms; normalize to seconds-ish. if t > 20000000000 then t = t / 1000 end return t end return os.time() end
local function _shallow_copy(src) if type(src) ~= "table" then return {} end local dst = {} for k, v in pairs(src) do dst[k] = v end return dst end
local function _ensure_table(t, key) if type(t[key]) ~= "table" then t[key] = {} end return t[key] end
local function _merge_defaults(dst, defaults) for k, v in pairs(defaults or {}) do if type(v) == "table" then if type(dst[k]) ~= "table" then dst[k] = {} end _merge_defaults(dst[k], v) else if dst[k] == nil then dst[k] = v end end end end
local function _clean_name(s) s = tostring(s or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") return s end
local function _tkey(name) name = _clean_name(name):lower() -- Keep Achaea-friendly keys (letters, digits, ', - and underscore) name = name:gsub("[%s]+","_") return name end
-- ---------- defaults ---------- local DEFAULTS = { meta = { schema_ver = 1, boot_at = 0, tick_id = 0, last_tick_at = 0, last_wake_at = 0, last_wake_reason = "", last_commit_hash = "", pending_tick = false, pending_reason = "", last_update = 0, dirty = {}, -- set of dirty domains reasons = {}, -- last flush reasons (set) },
self = { name = "", vitals = {}, bal = false, eq = false, affs = { map = {}, last_update = 0 }, flags = {}, cds = {}, last_update = 0, _vitals_sig = "", },
target = { name = "", key = "", present = false, source = "", at = 0, },
opp = {},
sensors = { readaura = { ready = true, reason = "", mark = 0, pending = { active = false, target = "", key = "", at = 0 }, }, },
queue = { model = { total = 0, by_q = {}, full = false, last_full_ts = 0, last_update = 0 }, lanes = { eq = { ready = nil, pending = false }, bal = { ready = nil, pending = false }, class = { ready = nil, pending = false, inflight = false }, free = { ready = true, pending = false }, }, last_update = 0, },
-- ------- Spine v1 compatibility (do not remove) ------- me = { bal = false, eq = false, prone = false, stunned = false, vitals = {}, affs = {}, cds = {}, flags = {}, last_update = 0, }, tgt = { name = "", present = false, affs = {}, defs = {}, limbs = {}, aura = {}, cds = {}, last_seen = 0, last_update = 0, }, }
local function _ensure_opp(key, name) if key == "" then return nil end local opp = _ensure_table(Yso.state, "opp") if type(opp[key]) ~= "table" then opp[key] = { name = _clean_name(name or key), key = key, last_seen = 0, last_update = 0, affs = { known = {}, last_update = 0 }, tracking = { prone = { val = nil, at = 0, src = "" } }, aura = { last = {}, last_update = 0 }, cds = {}, flags = {}, } end return opp[key] end
-- ---------- init ---------- function Yso.state.init() _merge_defaults(Yso.state, DEFAULTS)
if (Yso.state.meta.boot_at or 0) == 0 then Yso.state.meta.boot_at = _now() end Yso.state.meta.last_update = Yso.state.meta.last_update or _now()
-- Ensure current target cache entry exists when target.name is set. local tname = _clean_name(Yso.state.target.name) if tname ~= "" then local key = _tkey(tname) Yso.state.target.key = key local o = _ensure_opp(key, tname) if o then o.last_seen = _now() o.last_update = _now() end end
return Yso.state end
-- ---------- compatibility mirrors ---------- local function _mirror_self_to_me() local s, me = Yso.state.self, Yso.state.me if type(s) ~= "table" or type(me) ~= "table" then return end me.bal = s.bal me.eq = s.eq me.vitals = _shallow_copy(s.vitals) me.last_update = s.last_update or me.last_update end
local function _mirror_target_to_tgt() local tgt = Yso.state.tgt local t = Yso.state.target if type(tgt) ~= "table" or type(t) ~= "table" then return end tgt.name = t.name or "" tgt.present = (t.present == true) end
-- ---------- API ---------- function Yso.state.reset_target(newname, source) Yso.state.init() newname = _clean_name(newname) source = _clean_name(source) local ts = _now()
-- target pointer Yso.state.target.name = newname Yso.state.target.key = _tkey(newname) Yso.state.target.present = (newname ~= "") Yso.state.target.source = (source ~= "" and source or Yso.state.target.source or "") Yso.state.target.at = ts
-- destructive wipe of Spine v1 tgt knowledge (per-target) local tgt = Yso.state.tgt tgt.name = newname tgt.present = (newname ~= "") tgt.affs, tgt.defs, tgt.limbs, tgt.aura, tgt.cds = {}, {}, {}, {}, {} tgt.last_seen, tgt.last_update = ts, ts
-- ensure per-opponent cache if newname ~= "" then local o = _ensure_opp(Yso.state.target.key, newname) if o then o.last_seen, o.last_update = ts, ts end end
-- recommended: avoid dedupe suppress on new target Yso.state.meta.last_commit_hash = "" Yso.state.meta.last_update = ts
_mirror_target_to_tgt() return Yso.state.target end
function Yso.state.set_target_present(is_present) Yso.state.init() local ts = _now() local on = (is_present == true)
Yso.state.target.present = on if on then Yso.state.target.at = ts local key = Yso.state.target.key or "" local o = _ensure_opp(key, Yso.state.target.name or key) if o then o.last_seen, o.last_update = ts, ts end Yso.state.tgt.last_seen = ts end
Yso.state.tgt.present = on Yso.state.tgt.last_update = ts Yso.state.meta.last_update = ts
return on end
function Yso.state.set_vitals(pkt) Yso.state.init() pkt = pkt or {}
local bal_raw = pkt.bal; if bal_raw == nil then bal_raw = pkt.balance end local eq_raw = pkt.eq; if eq_raw == nil then eq_raw = pkt.equilibrium end
local bal = (tostring(bal_raw or "") == "1" or bal_raw == true) local eq = (tostring(eq_raw or "") == "1" or eq_raw == true)
local ts = _now() local self = Yso.state.self self.bal = bal self.eq = eq self.vitals = _shallow_copy(pkt) self.last_update = ts
-- legacy mirror local me = Yso.state.me me.bal = bal me.eq = eq me.vitals = _shallow_copy(pkt) me.last_update = ts
Yso.state.meta.last_update = ts return self end
function Yso.state.set_flag(side, key, value) Yso.state.init() side = tostring(side or ""):lower() key = tostring(key or "") local ts = _now()
if side == "tgt" or side == "target" then _ensure_table(Yso.state.tgt, "flags")[key] = value _ensure_table(Yso.state.target, "flags")[key] = value Yso.state.tgt.last_update = ts else _ensure_table(Yso.state.me, "flags")[key] = value _ensure_table(Yso.state.self, "flags")[key] = value Yso.state.me.last_update = ts end Yso.state.meta.last_update = ts return value end
function Yso.state.snapshot() Yso.state.init() _mirror_self_to_me() _mirror_target_to_tgt() return { meta = _shallow_copy(Yso.state.meta), self = _shallow_copy(Yso.state.self), target = _shallow_copy(Yso.state.target), queue = _shallow_copy(Yso.state.queue), me = _shallow_copy(Yso.state.me), tgt = _shallow_copy(Yso.state.tgt), ts = _now(), } end
-- bootstrap defaults Yso.state.init()
--========================================================--

Script.name: Yso.state wiring
Yso ingest
Script.script:
--========================================================-- -- Yso.ingest ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â Trigger/GMCP facts -> Yso.state updates (Phase 1) -- -- Design: -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ Triggers/GMCP handlers call ingest() only (no logic here). -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ Ingest updates Yso.state + marks dirty. -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ Wake coalescing delegates to Yso.engine.wake() (or Yso.pulse.wake()). -- -- Back-compat: -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ Maintains Yso.state.me/tgt mirrors for older offense code. -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ Can optionally wrap Yso.aff_gain/Yso.aff_cure when they exist. --========================================================--
Yso = Yso or {} Yso.ingest = Yso.ingest or {} Yso.state = Yso.state or {}
local I = Yso.ingest
local function _now() if type(getEpoch) == "function" then local t = tonumber(getEpoch()) or os.time() if t > 20000000000 then t = t / 1000 end return t end return os.time() end
local function _clean(s) return (tostring(s or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","")) end
local function _tkey(name) name = _clean(name):lower():gsub("[%s]+","_") return name end
local function _normalize_aff(a) if type(a) == "table" then a = a.name or a.affliction or a.id end a = tostring(a or "") a = a:gsub("[%.,;:!%?]+$", ""):gsub("[%s%-]+","_"):lower() return (a ~= "" and a) or nil end
local function _dirty(key) if Yso.engine and type(Yso.engine.mark_dirty) == "function" then Yso.engine.mark_dirty(key) else Yso.state.meta = Yso.state.meta or {} Yso.state.meta.dirty = Yso.state.meta.dirty or {} Yso.state.meta.dirty[key] = true end end
local function _wake(reason, dirty_key) if Yso.engine and type(Yso.engine.wake) == "function" then Yso.engine.wake(reason, dirty_key) elseif Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.wake) == "function" then if dirty_key then _dirty(dirty_key) end Yso.pulse.wake(reason) end end
local function _ensure() if Yso.state and type(Yso.state.init) == "function" then Yso.state.init() else Yso.state.self = Yso.state.self or { vitals = {}, affs = { map = {} }, flags = {} } Yso.state.me = Yso.state.me or { vitals = {}, affs = {}, flags = {} } Yso.state.tgt = Yso.state.tgt or { affs = {}, defs = {}, limbs = {}, aura = {} } Yso.state.target = Yso.state.target or { name = "", key = "", present = false } Yso.state.opp = Yso.state.opp or {} Yso.state.meta = Yso.state.meta or { dirty = {} } end end
-- ---------------- vitals ---------------- function I.vitals(pkt, src) _ensure() pkt = pkt or {} src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "gmcp" end
local self = Yso.state.self or {} local prev = tostring(self._vitals_sig or "")
local bal_raw = pkt.bal; if bal_raw == nil then bal_raw = pkt.balance end local eq_raw = pkt.eq; if eq_raw == nil then eq_raw = pkt.equilibrium end
local bal = (tostring(bal_raw or "") == "1" or bal_raw == true) local eq = (tostring(eq_raw or "") == "1" or eq_raw == true)
local hp = tostring(pkt.hp or "") local mp = tostring(pkt.mp or "") local ep = tostring(pkt.ep or "") local wp = tostring(pkt.wp or "") local nl = tostring(pkt.nl or "")
local sig = table.concat({eq and "1" or "0", bal and "1" or "0", hp, mp, ep, wp, nl}, "|")
-- Always update state (cheap); wake only when signature changes if type(Yso.state.set_vitals) == "function" then Yso.state.set_vitals(pkt) else Yso.state.self = Yso.state.self or {} Yso.state.self.bal, Yso.state.self.eq = bal, eq Yso.state.self.vitals = pkt Yso.state.me = Yso.state.me or {} Yso.state.me.bal, Yso.state.me.eq = bal, eq Yso.state.me.vitals = pkt end
Yso.state.self._vitals_sig = sig
if sig ~= prev then _dirty("vitals") _wake("vitals:"..src) end end
-- ---------------- target ---------------- function I.target_set(name, source, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} name = _clean(name) source = _clean(source); if source == "" then source = "unknown" end if name == "" then return false end
local cur = _clean((Yso.state.target and Yso.state.target.name) or (Yso.state.tgt and Yso.state.tgt.name) or "") if cur:lower() == name:lower() and (Yso.state.target and Yso.state.target.present) then return true end
if type(Yso.state.reset_target) == "function" then Yso.state.reset_target(name, source) else Yso.state.target = Yso.state.target or {} Yso.state.target.name, Yso.state.target.key = name, _tkey(name) Yso.state.target.present, Yso.state.target.source = true, source Yso.state.tgt = Yso.state.tgt or {}; Yso.state.tgt.name, Yso.state.tgt.present = name, true end
_dirty("target") if not opts.nowake then _wake("target:set:"..source) end return true end
function I.target_left(reason, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} reason = _clean(reason); if reason == "" then reason = "left" end
if type(Yso.state.set_target_present) == "function" then Yso.state.set_target_present(false) else if Yso.state.target then Yso.state.target.present = false end if Yso.state.tgt then Yso.state.tgt.present = false end end
_dirty("target") if not opts.nowake then _wake("target:left:"..reason) end return true end
-- ---------------- self affs ---------------- function I.aff_gain(side, aff, src, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} side = tostring(side or "me"):lower() src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "unknown" end aff = _normalize_aff(aff) if not aff then return end
local ts = _now()
if side == "tgt" or side == "target" then Yso.state.tgt = Yso.state.tgt or {}; Yso.state.tgt.affs = Yso.state.tgt.affs or {} Yso.state.tgt.affs[aff] = true Yso.state.tgt.last_update = ts _dirty("tgt_affs") else Yso.state.self = Yso.state.self or {}; Yso.state.self.affs = Yso.state.self.affs or { map = {} } Yso.state.self.affs.map = Yso.state.self.affs.map or {} Yso.state.self.affs.map[aff] = true Yso.state.self.affs.last_update = ts
Yso.state.me = Yso.state.me or {}; Yso.state.me.affs = Yso.state.me.affs or {} Yso.state.me.affs[aff] = true Yso.state.me.last_update = ts _dirty("affs") end
if not opts.nowake then _wake("aff_gain:"..side..":"..src) end end
function I.aff_cure(side, aff, src, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} side = tostring(side or "me"):lower() src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "unknown" end aff = _normalize_aff(aff) if not aff then return end
local ts = _now()
if side == "tgt" or side == "target" then Yso.state.tgt = Yso.state.tgt or {}; Yso.state.tgt.affs = Yso.state.tgt.affs or {} Yso.state.tgt.affs[aff] = nil Yso.state.tgt.last_update = ts _dirty("tgt_affs") else if Yso.state.self and Yso.state.self.affs and Yso.state.self.affs.map then Yso.state.self.affs.map[aff] = nil Yso.state.self.affs.last_update = ts end if Yso.state.me and Yso.state.me.affs then Yso.state.me.affs[aff] = nil Yso.state.me.last_update = ts end _dirty("affs") end
if not opts.nowake then _wake("aff_cure:"..side..":"..src) end end
function I.aff_sync(side, map, src, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} side = tostring(side or "me"):lower() src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "sync" end if type(map) ~= "table" then return end
local ts = _now()
if side == "tgt" or side == "target" then Yso.state.tgt = Yso.state.tgt or {}; Yso.state.tgt.affs = {} for a,_ in pairs(map) do if a then Yso.state.tgt.affs[tostring(a)] = true end end Yso.state.tgt.last_update = ts _dirty("tgt_affs") else Yso.state.self = Yso.state.self or {}; Yso.state.self.affs = Yso.state.self.affs or { map = {} } Yso.state.self.affs.map = {} for a,_ in pairs(map) do if a then Yso.state.self.affs.map[tostring(a)] = true end end Yso.state.self.affs.last_update = ts
Yso.state.me = Yso.state.me or {}; Yso.state.me.affs = {} for a,_ in pairs(map) do if a then Yso.state.me.affs[tostring(a)] = true end end Yso.state.me.last_update = ts _dirty("affs") end
if not opts.nowake then _wake("aff_sync:"..side..":"..src) end end
-- ---------------- queue list parser ---------------- function I.queue_list(model, rows, src, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "queue_list" end if type(model) ~= "table" then return end
local ts = _now()
Yso.state.queue = Yso.state.queue or {} Yso.state.queue.model = Yso.state.queue.model or {} for k,v in pairs(model) do Yso.state.queue.model[k] = v end Yso.state.queue.model.last_update = ts Yso.state.queue.last_update = ts
-- Optional: store last parsed rows (debug only; can be heavy) if opts.store_rows and type(rows) == "table" then Yso.state.queue.last_rows = rows end
_dirty("queue") if not opts.nowake then _wake("queue:list:"..src) end end
-- ---------------- readaura ---------------- function I.readaura_ready(val, reason, src, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} local r = (val == true) reason = _clean(reason) src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "readaura" end
Yso.state.sensors = Yso.state.sensors or {} Yso.state.sensors.readaura = Yso.state.sensors.readaura or { pending = {} } local RA = Yso.state.sensors.readaura RA.ready = r RA.reason = reason RA.mark = _now()
_dirty("readaura") if not opts.nowake then _wake("readaura:"..(r and "ready" or "down")..":"..src) end return r end
function I.readaura_begin(tgt, src, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} tgt = _clean(tgt); if tgt == "" then return false end src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "begin" end
Yso.state.sensors = Yso.state.sensors or {} Yso.state.sensors.readaura = Yso.state.sensors.readaura or { pending = {} } local RA = Yso.state.sensors.readaura RA.pending = RA.pending or {} RA.pending.active = true RA.pending.target = tgt RA.pending.key = _tkey(tgt) RA.pending.at = _now()
_dirty("readaura") if not opts.nowake then _wake("readaura:begin:"..src) end return true end
function I.readaura_result(tgt, phys, ment, flags, src, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} tgt = _clean(tgt); if tgt == "" then return false end src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "finalize" end
local key = _tkey(tgt) Yso.state.opp = Yso.state.opp or {} if type(Yso.state.opp[key]) ~= "table" then Yso.state.opp[key] = { name = tgt, key = key, aura = { last = {} } } end
local o = Yso.state.opp[key] o.name = tgt o.key = key o.aura = o.aura or { last = {} } o.aura.last = o.aura.last or {}
o.aura.last.ts = _now() o.aura.last.physical = tonumber(phys) or 0 o.aura.last.mental = tonumber(ment) or 0 if type(flags) == "table" then for k,v in pairs(flags) do o.aura.last[tostring(k)] = (v == true) end end o.aura.last_update = o.aura.last.ts o.last_update = o.aura.last.ts o.last_seen = o.aura.last.ts
-- if this is current target, mirror into Spine v1 tgt.aura local curk = (Yso.state.target and Yso.state.target.key) or _tkey((Yso.state.tgt and Yso.state.tgt.name) or "") if curk ~= "" and curk == key and Yso.state.tgt then Yso.state.tgt.aura = Yso.state.tgt.aura or {} Yso.state.tgt.aura.last = o.aura.last Yso.state.tgt.last_update = o.aura.last.ts end
-- close pending if Yso.state.sensors and Yso.state.sensors.readaura and Yso.state.sensors.readaura.pending then Yso.state.sensors.readaura.pending.active = false end
_dirty("readaura") if not opts.nowake then _wake("readaura:result:"..src) end return true end
-- ---------------- opponent tracking (AK hooks) ---------------- function I.opp_prone(tgt, is_prone, src, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} tgt = _clean(tgt); if tgt == "" then return false end src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "prone" end
local key = _tkey(tgt) Yso.state.opp = Yso.state.opp or {} if type(Yso.state.opp[key]) ~= "table" then Yso.state.opp[key] = { name = tgt, key = key, tracking = { prone = {} } } end local o = Yso.state.opp[key] o.tracking = o.tracking or {} o.tracking.prone = o.tracking.prone or {} o.tracking.prone.val = (is_prone == true) o.tracking.prone.at = _now() o.tracking.prone.src = src o.last_update = o.tracking.prone.at o.last_seen = o.tracking.prone.at
-- mirror into current target affs if this matches current target local curk = (Yso.state.target and Yso.state.target.key) or _tkey((Yso.state.tgt and Yso.state.tgt.name) or "") if curk ~= "" and curk == key then Yso.state.tgt = Yso.state.tgt or {}; Yso.state.tgt.affs = Yso.state.tgt.affs or {} if is_prone == true then Yso.state.tgt.affs.prone = true else Yso.state.tgt.affs.prone = nil end Yso.state.tgt.last_update = _now() _dirty("tgt_affs") end
_dirty("opp") if not opts.nowake then _wake("opp:prone:"..src) end return true end
-- ---------------- optional: hook existing aff pipeline ---------------- I._hooked = I._hooked or false function I.hook_aff_pipeline() if I._hooked then return end if type(Yso.aff_gain) ~= "function" or type(Yso.aff_cure) ~= "function" then return end
I._orig_aff_gain = I._orig_aff_gain or Yso.aff_gain I._orig_aff_cure = I._orig_aff_cure or Yso.aff_cure
Yso.aff_gain = function(a, ...) local r1, r2, r3 = I._orig_aff_gain(a, ...) I.aff_gain("me", a, "aff_gain_wrap", { nowake = true }) return r1, r2, r3 end
Yso.aff_cure = function(a, ...) local r1, r2, r3 = I._orig_aff_cure(a, ...) I.aff_cure("me", a, "aff_cure_wrap", { nowake = true }) return r1, r2, r3 end
I._hooked = true end
pcall(I.hook_aff_pipeline)
--========================================================--
--========================================================-- -- Back-compat: AK readaura triggers (aura_* API) -- AK.xml expects: -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ Yso.ingest.aura_begin(tgt) -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ Yso.ingest.aura_def(def, true) -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ Yso.ingest.aura_aff(aff) -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ Yso.ingest.aura_flag(key, value) -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ Yso.ingest.aura_end(tgt, phys, ment) -- -- This maps aura_* -> readaura_* and preserves any extra fields -- under: Yso.state.opp[<tkey>].aura.last_raw --========================================================-- do local I = Yso.ingest
local function _clean(s) return (tostring(s or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","")) end local function _tkey(name) name = _clean(name):lower():gsub("[%s]+","_") return name end
local function _pending() Yso.state = Yso.state or {} Yso.state.sensors = Yso.state.sensors or {} Yso.state.sensors.readaura = Yso.state.sensors.readaura or { pending = {} } local RA = Yso.state.sensors.readaura RA.pending = RA.pending or {} RA.pending._ak = RA.pending._ak or { defs = {}, affs = {}, flags = {}, raw = {} } return RA.pending end
-- Begin snapshot if type(I.aura_begin) ~= "function" then function I.aura_begin(tgt, src, opts) opts = opts or {} local ok = false if type(I.readaura_begin) == "function" then ok = I.readaura_begin(tgt, src or "ak", opts) end local p = _pending() p._ak = { defs = {}, affs = {}, flags = {}, raw = {} } return ok end end
-- Record a DEF seen during readaura parse if type(I.aura_def) ~= "function" then function I.aura_def(def, val, src, opts) local p = _pending() def = tostring(def or ""):lower() if def == "" then return false end local b = (val == nil) and true or (val == true) p._ak.defs[def] = b p._ak.flags["def:"..def] = b return true end end
-- Record an AFF seen during readaura parse if type(I.aura_aff) ~= "function" then function I.aura_aff(aff, src, opts) local p = _pending() aff = tostring(aff or ""):lower() if aff == "" then return false end p._ak.affs[aff] = true p._ak.flags["aff:"..aff] = true return true end end
-- Record a misc flag/value seen during readaura parse if type(I.aura_flag) ~= "function" then function I.aura_flag(key, val, src, opts) local p = _pending() key = tostring(key or "") if key == "" then return false end p._ak.raw[key] = val if val == true then p._ak.flags["flag:"..key] = true end return true end end
-- Finalize snapshot if type(I.aura_end) ~= "function" then function I.aura_end(tgt, phys, ment, src, opts) opts = opts or {} local p = _pending()
-- only boolean flags go into readaura_result() flags param local flags = {} if p._ak and p._ak.flags then for k,v in pairs(p._ak.flags) do flags[k] = (v == true) end end
local ok = false if type(I.readaura_result) == "function" then ok = I.readaura_result(tgt, phys, ment, flags, src or "ak", opts) end
-- Preserve richer/structured values if ok and p._ak then local key = _tkey(tgt) local o = Yso.state and Yso.state.opp and Yso.state.opp[key] if type(o) == "table" then o.aura = o.aura or {} o.aura.last_raw = o.aura.last_raw or {} o.aura.last_raw.defs = p._ak.defs o.aura.last_raw.affs = p._ak.affs for k,v in pairs(p._ak.raw or {}) do o.aura.last_raw[k] = v end end end
-- reset extras so next snapshot is clean p._ak = { defs = {}, affs = {}, flags = {}, raw = {} } return ok end end end

Script.name: Yso.offense.request_tick
Script.script:
--========================================================-- -- Yso.offense ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â Tick Coalescing (Offense Spine v1, Step 3) -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã…â€œÃ¢â‚¬Â¦ Coalesce event storms into 1 tick -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã…â€œÃ¢â‚¬Â¦ Stores pending reason for debugging -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã…â€œÃ¢â‚¬Â¦ Safe even if tick() not implemented yet --========================================================--
Yso = Yso or {} Yso.offense = Yso.offense or {} Yso.state = Yso.state or {}
local function _now() if type(getEpoch) == "function" then return getEpoch() end return os.time() end
local function _append_reason(old, new) old = tostring(old or "") new = tostring(new or "") if new == "" then return old end if old == "" then return new end -- keep it short-ish if #old > 160 then return old end return old .. "|" .. new end
-- Provide tick stub if not present yet (Step 4 will replace) Yso.offense.tick = Yso.offense.tick or function(_reason) end
function Yso.offense.request_tick(reason) Yso.state.init() local meta = Yso.state.meta reason = tostring(reason or "")
meta.pending_reason = _append_reason(meta.pending_reason, reason)
if meta.pending_tick then return false -- already scheduled end
meta.pending_tick = true
-- Coalesce to next engine cycle (0-delay timer) tempTimer(0, function() -- Clear pending BEFORE running tick (so tick can re-request safely) Yso.state.init() local m = Yso.state.meta m.pending_tick = false
local r = m.pending_reason m.pending_reason = "" m.last_tick = _now()
-- Run offense evaluation if type(Yso.offense.tick) == "function" then pcall(Yso.offense.tick, r) end end)
return true end
--========================================================--

Script.name: Yso.occ.offense
Script.script:
--========================================================-- -- Yso.occ ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â Offense Routing (Occultist) [Planner Step: Defense-aware Preflight] -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã…â€œÃ¢â‚¬Â¦ Centralizes "intent" selection for Occultist (setup/preflight/pressure/recover) -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã…â€œÃ¢â‚¬Â¦ Preflight focuses on PINCHAURA-strippable aura defences (ignore cloak) -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã…â€œÃ¢â‚¬Â¦ Uses READAURA cooldown gating to avoid spam if baseline is missing/stale -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã…â€œÃ¢â‚¬Â¦ Post-commit: optimistic state updates (clear stripped def, stamp cds) -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã…â€œÃ¢â‚¬Â¦ Uses Yso.state snapshot as the single read source -- Notes: -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ We do NOT track/act on rebounding (magical class; not strip-relevant here) -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ We ignore "mounted" for Occultist offense (per user direction) --========================================================--
Yso = Yso or {} Yso.occ = Yso.occ or {} Yso.state = Yso.state or {} Yso.offense = Yso.offense or {}
Yso.occ.cfg = Yso.occ.cfg or {} Yso.occ.cfg.preflight = Yso.occ.cfg.preflight or { -- PINCHAURA strips: cloak, speed, caloric, frost, levitation, insomnia, kola. -- We ignore cloak. pinchaura_order = {"speed","caloric","frost","levitation","insomnia","kola"}, }
Yso.occ.cfg.aura = Yso.occ.cfg.aura or { stale_after = 30, -- seconds until we consider baseline stale }
local function _now() if type(getEpoch) == "function" then local t = getEpoch() if type(t) == "number" and t > 1e12 then t = t / 1000 end return t end return os.time() end
local function _safe_tbl(t) return (type(t) == "table") and t or {} end
local function _tgt_ok(s) return s and s.tgt and s.tgt.present and (s.tgt.name and s.tgt.name ~= "") end
local function _aura(s) return _safe_tbl(s and s.tgt and s.tgt.aura) end local function _defs(s) return _safe_tbl(s and s.tgt and s.tgt.defs) end local function _cds(s) return _safe_tbl(s and s.tgt and s.tgt.cds) end
local function _has_baseline(s) local a = _aura(s) return a.baseline == true end
local function _baseline_stale(s) local a = _aura(s) if a.baseline ~= true then return true end local ts = tonumber(a.ts) or 0 if ts <= 0 then -- If baseline is true but ts missing, treat as "fresh enough". return false end return (_now() - ts) >= (Yso.occ.cfg.aura.stale_after or 30) end
local function _readaura_cd_ok(s) local cds = _cds(s) local last = tonumber(cds.readaura) or 0 local cd = 8.0 if Yso.offense and Yso.offense.cfg and tonumber(Yso.offense.cfg.aura_cooldown) then cd = tonumber(Yso.offense.cfg.aura_cooldown) end return (_now() - last) >= cd end
function Yso.occ.preflight_needed(s) local defs = _defs(s) local order = (Yso.occ.cfg.preflight and Yso.occ.cfg.preflight.pinchaura_order) or {} for i = 1, #order do local k = order[i] if defs[k] == true then return true end end return false end
function Yso.occ.pick_pinchaura_def(s) local defs = _defs(s) local order = (Yso.occ.cfg.preflight and Yso.occ.cfg.preflight.pinchaura_order) or {} for i = 1, #order do local k = order[i] if defs[k] == true then return k end end return nil end
function Yso.occ.select_intent(s) -- Fallback safety if not _tgt_ok(s) then return "idle" end
-- Recover stage (reserved) if s.me and (s.me.prone == true or s.me.stunned == true) then return "recover" end
-- Setup: obtain/refresh AURA baseline (only if enabled, and cd allows) local auto_aura = true if Yso.offense and Yso.offense.cfg and Yso.offense.cfg.auto_aura == false then auto_aura = false end
if auto_aura and (not _has_baseline(s) or _baseline_stale(s)) and _readaura_cd_ok(s) then return "setup" end
-- Preflight: remove PINCHAURA-strippable defences (ignore cloak) if Yso.occ.preflight_needed(s) then return "preflight" end
-- Pressure: the actual damage/aff pipeline (next planner chunk) return "pressure" end
function Yso.occ.plan(s, intent) intent = tostring(intent or "") if intent == "" then intent = Yso.occ.select_intent(s) end
local cmds = {} if not _tgt_ok(s) then return cmds, intent end
local tgt = s.tgt.name
-- Conservative gating: don't stage eq actions if eq isn't ready. local eq_ok = (s.me and s.me.eq == true)
if intent == "setup" then if eq_ok then table.insert(cmds, "readaura " .. tgt) end return cmds, intent end
if intent == "preflight" then if eq_ok then local def = Yso.occ.pick_pinchaura_def(s) if def then table.insert(cmds, ("pinchaura %s %s"):format(tgt, def)) end end return cmds, intent end
-- recover/pressure: placeholder (next chunk) return cmds, intent end
function Yso.occ.post_commit(intent, cmds) -- Called by the offense spine AFTER we successfully committed. intent = tostring(intent or "") if type(cmds) ~= "table" then return end
Yso.state.init() local now = _now()
if intent == "setup" then -- Stamp READAURA cd only after commit (not on plan) Yso.state.tgt.cds = Yso.state.tgt.cds or {} Yso.state.tgt.cds.readaura = now
-- Optimistic latch: we're "reading" until finalize arrives. Yso.state.tgt.aura = Yso.state.tgt.aura or {} Yso.state.tgt.aura.reading = true Yso.state.tgt.aura.subject = Yso.state.tgt.name or Yso.state.tgt.aura.subject return end
if intent == "preflight" then -- Optimistically clear the stripped defence to prevent repeat spam. Yso.state.tgt.defs = Yso.state.tgt.defs or {} for i = 1, #cmds do local cmd = tostring(cmds[i] or "") local def = cmd:match("^%s*pinchaura%s+%S+%s+(%S+)") if def and def ~= "" then def = def:lower() Yso.state.tgt.defs[def] = false end end end end
--========================================================--

Script.name: Yso.offense.tick
Script.script:
--========================================================-- -- Yso.offense.tick ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â Spine (Step 5: Yso.occ routing + preflight) -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã…â€œÃ¢â‚¬Â¦ Early exits + safe queue locking check -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã…â€œÃ¢â‚¬Â¦ Intent selection delegated to Yso.occ.select_intent() -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã…â€œÃ¢â‚¬Â¦ Planning delegated to Yso.occ.plan() -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã…â€œÃ¢â‚¬Â¦ Post-commit stamping via Yso.occ.post_commit() -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã…â€œÃ¢â‚¬Â¦ Dedupe is time-windowed (prevents spam, allows repeat later) --========================================================--
Yso = Yso or {} Yso.offense = Yso.offense or {} Yso.state = Yso.state or {}
Yso.offense.cfg = Yso.offense.cfg or { debug = false, auto_aura = true, dedupe_window = 0.35, -- seconds: identical plan within this window is skipped aura_cooldown = 8.0, -- seconds: minimum gap between READAURA attempts }
local function _now() if type(getEpoch) == "function" then local t = getEpoch() if type(t) == "number" and t > 1e12 then t = t / 1000 end return t end return os.time() end
local function _dbg(msg) if Yso.offense.cfg and Yso.offense.cfg.debug and cecho then cecho("[Yso.offense] " .. tostring(msg) .. "\n") end end
local function _queue_locked() if type(Yso.queue) ~= "table" then return true, "no_queue" end
-- Prefer explicit method when present (likely expects self) if type(Yso.queue.is_locked) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.queue.is_locked, Yso.queue) if ok and res then return true, "is_locked" end end
if Yso.queue.locked == true then return true, "locked" end if Yso.queue.busy == true then return true, "busy" end if Yso.queue.sending == true then return true, "sending" end
return false, "" end
local function _dedupe_ok(plan_string) Yso.state.init() local meta = Yso.state.meta if not plan_string or plan_string == "" then return false end
local last = tostring(meta.last_commit_hash or "") local ts = tonumber(meta.last_commit_ts or 0) or 0 local win = tonumber((Yso.offense.cfg and Yso.offense.cfg.dedupe_window) or 0.35) or 0.35
if last == plan_string and (_now() - ts) < win then return false end return true end
local function _mark_committed(plan_string) Yso.state.init() local meta = Yso.state.meta meta.last_commit_hash = plan_string or "" meta.last_commit_ts = _now() meta.last_update = meta.last_commit_ts end
local function _commit_cmds(cmds, intent) if type(cmds) ~= "table" or #cmds == 0 then return false end
local sep = (Yso.sep or ";;") local plan_string = table.concat(cmds, sep)
if not _dedupe_ok(plan_string) then _dbg("dedupe skip: " .. plan_string) return false end
if type(Yso.queue) ~= "table" or type(Yso.queue.stage) ~= "function" or type(Yso.queue.commit) ~= "function" then _dbg("queue missing stage/commit; skipping output") return false end
for i = 1, #cmds do Yso.queue.stage(cmds[i]) end Yso.queue.commit() _mark_committed(plan_string)
if Yso.occ and type(Yso.occ.post_commit) == "function" then pcall(Yso.occ.post_commit, intent, cmds) end
_dbg("commit: " .. plan_string) return true end
-- ---------- main tick ---------- function Yso.offense.tick(reason) Yso.state.init()
local locked, why = _queue_locked() if locked then _dbg("tick skip (queue " .. why .. ") reason=" .. tostring(reason or "")) return end
local s = Yso.state.snapshot() if not (s and s.tgt and s.tgt.present and s.tgt.name and s.tgt.name ~= "") then _dbg("tick skip (no target present) reason=" .. tostring(reason or "")) return end
-- route intent via Yso.occ if available, fallback to "pressure" local intent = "pressure" if Yso.occ and type(Yso.occ.select_intent) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.occ.select_intent, s) if ok and type(res) == "string" and res ~= "" then intent = res end end
-- plan commands local cmds = {} if Yso.occ and type(Yso.occ.plan) == "function" then local ok, res_cmds, res_intent = pcall(Yso.occ.plan, s, intent) if ok and type(res_cmds) == "table" then cmds = res_cmds end if ok and type(res_intent) == "string" and res_intent ~= "" then intent = res_intent end end
if Yso.offense.cfg and Yso.offense.cfg.debug then _dbg("tick intent=" .. intent .. " reason=" .. tostring(reason or "")) end
_commit_cmds(cmds, intent) end
--========================================================--

Script.name: Yso.engine (event plumbing)
Script.script:
--========================================================-- -- Yso.engine ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â Phase 1 Event Plumbing -- -- Responsibilities: -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ Dirty-mask bookkeeping (Yso.state.meta.dirty) -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ Unified wake() -> Yso.pulse.wake() -- ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¢ First responder tick registered into Yso.pulse -- (does NOT emit commands; safe during plumbing tests) --========================================================--
Yso = Yso or {} Yso.engine = Yso.engine or {} Yso.state = Yso.state or {}
local E = Yso.engine
E.cfg = E.cfg or { debug = false, -- verbose cecho logs keep_wake_ring = 20, -- store last N wakes in state.meta.wake_ring }
local function _now() if type(getEpoch) == "function" then local t = tonumber(getEpoch()) or os.time() if t > 20000000000 then t = t / 1000 end return t end return os.time() end
local function _dbg(msg) if E.cfg.debug then cecho(string.format("<dim_grey>[Yso.engine] <reset>%s\n", tostring(msg))) end end
local function _ensure() if Yso.state and type(Yso.state.init) == "function" then Yso.state.init() else Yso.state.meta = Yso.state.meta or {} Yso.state.meta.dirty = Yso.state.meta.dirty or {} end end
function E.mark_dirty(key) _ensure() key = tostring(key or "") if key == "" then return end Yso.state.meta.dirty = Yso.state.meta.dirty or {} Yso.state.meta.dirty[key] = true Yso.state.meta.last_update = _now() end
function E.clear_dirty() _ensure() Yso.state.meta.dirty = {} end
function E.wake(reason, dirty_key) _ensure() reason = tostring(reason or "wake") if dirty_key then E.mark_dirty(dirty_key) end
Yso.state.meta.last_wake_at = _now() Yso.state.meta.last_wake_reason = reason
-- ring buffer Yso.state.meta.wake_ring = Yso.state.meta.wake_ring or {} local ring = Yso.state.meta.wake_ring ring[#ring+1] = { at = Yso.state.meta.last_wake_at, reason = reason } local keep = tonumber(E.cfg.keep_wake_ring or 20) or 20 while #ring > keep do table.remove(ring, 1) end
if Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.wake) == "function" then Yso.pulse.wake(reason) end
_dbg("wake: "..reason) end
function E.tick(reasons) _ensure() local ts = _now()
-- Bookkeeping Yso.state.meta.tick_id = (tonumber(Yso.state.meta.tick_id) or 0) + 1 Yso.state.meta.last_tick_at = ts Yso.state.meta.reasons = {} if type(reasons) == "table" then for _,r in ipairs(reasons) do Yso.state.meta.reasons[tostring(r)] = true end end
-- Mirror pulse lane readiness into state.queue.lanes (for debug + planning) if Yso.pulse and Yso.pulse.state and type(Yso.pulse.state.lanes) == "table" then Yso.state.queue = Yso.state.queue or {} Yso.state.queue.lanes = Yso.state.queue.lanes or {} for lane, L in pairs(Yso.pulse.state.lanes) do Yso.state.queue.lanes[lane] = Yso.state.queue.lanes[lane] or {} Yso.state.queue.lanes[lane].ready = (L.ready == true) Yso.state.queue.lanes[lane].pending = (L.pending == true) if lane == "class" then Yso.state.queue.lanes[lane].inflight = (L.inflight == true) end end Yso.state.queue.last_update = ts end
-- Mirror queue model if present (Yso.queue is authoritative for list parser) if Yso.queue and type(Yso.queue.model) == "table" then Yso.state.queue = Yso.state.queue or {} Yso.state.queue.model = Yso.state.queue.model or {} for k,v in pairs(Yso.queue.model) do Yso.state.queue.model[k] = v end Yso.state.queue.model.last_update = ts end
-- Clear dirty at end of tick (Phase 1: nothing consumes it yet) local dirty = Yso.state.meta.dirty or {} local dirty_count = 0 for _ in pairs(dirty) do dirty_count = dirty_count + 1 end if dirty_count > 0 then _dbg("tick "..Yso.state.meta.tick_id.." dirty="..dirty_count) end Yso.state.meta.dirty = {} end
-- Register into pulse (order 0 = first) if Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.register) == "function" then Yso.pulse.register("engine.tick", function(reasons) local ok,err = pcall(E.tick, reasons) if not ok then _dbg("ERR tick: "..tostring(err)) end end, { order = 0 }) end
-- Compatibility: older modules may call Yso.offense.request_tick() Yso.offense = Yso.offense or {} if type(Yso.offense.request_tick) ~= "function" then function Yso.offense.request_tick(reason) E.wake("offense:"..tostring(reason or "tick")) end end
_dbg("engine loaded") --========================================================--

Script.name: Self Limb tracking
Script.script:
-- Auto-exported from Mudlet package script: Self Limb tracking -- DO NOT EDIT IN XML; edit this file instead.
Legacy = Legacy or {} Legacy.Occultist = Legacy.Occultist or {} Legacy.Occultist._eh = Legacy.Occultist._eh or {}
-- Handler signature (Legacy.SLC.Hit): (event, attacker, limb, dmg, hits, dmgTotal) function Legacy.Occultist.onLimbHit(event, attacker, limb, dmg, hits, dmgTotal) -- Example filter: only care when attacker is your current target (Yso canonical target) local t = (type(Yso.get_target)=="function" and Yso.get_target()) or Yso.target if attacker and type(t)=="string" and t ~= "" and attacker:lower() ~= t:lower() then return end
-- TODO: Your Occultist logic here (alerts, automated decisions, logging, etc.) -- e.g. if limb == "left leg" and hits >= 3 then ... end
local function _kill(id) if id then killAnonymousEventHandler(id) end end _kill(Legacy.Occultist._eh.slc_hit) Legacy.Occultist._eh.slc_hit = registerAnonymousEventHandler("Legacy.SLC.Hit", Legacy.Occultist.onLimbHit)

Script.name: Prio Baselines
Cureset Baselines
Yso_configs

Legacy.Fool.min_affs = 6 Legacy.Fool.queue_mode = "addclearfull" Legacy.Fool.queue_type = "bal"

Script.name: Yso_modes.lua
Script.script:
--========================================================-- -- yso_modes.lua (DROP-IN) -- Purpose: -- â€¢ Central "mode of play" switch for Yso -- â€¢ Modes: "bash", "combat", "party" -- â€¢ Party subroutes: "aff" (team affliction), "dam" (team damage) -- â€¢ Non-destructive: only flips optional toggles if present -- -- API: -- Yso.mode.set("bash"|"combat"|"party"[, reason]) -- Yso.mode.toggle([reason]) -- toggles bash <-> combat -- Yso.mode.is_bash() / is_hunt() / is_combat() / is_party() -- Yso.mode.set_party_route("aff"|"dam"[, reason]) -- raiseEvent("yso.mode.changed", old, new, reason) on mode change -- raiseEvent("yso.party.route.changed", old, new, reason) on party route change -- -- Suggested aliases (tempAlias, auto-registered if available): -- ^mode$ -> Yso.mode.echo() -- ^mode\s+(bash|combat|party|hunt)$ -> Yso.mode.set(matches[2], "alias") -- ^mbash$ -> Yso.mode.set("bash", "alias") -- ^combat$ -> Yso.mode.set("combat", "alias") -- ^party(?:\s+(aff|dam))?$ -> set party mode; optional route -- ^partyroute\s+(aff|dam)$ -> Yso.mode.set_party_route(matches[2]) -- ^mt$ -> Yso.mode.toggle("alias") -- -- Back-compat: -- â€¢ "hunt" normalizes to "bash" -- â€¢ is_hunt() remains available and maps to bash mode -- â€¢ ^mhunt$ is kept as a compatibility shim to set bash mode --========================================================--
-- Normalize namespace so both _G.Yso and _G.yso point to the same table. _G.Yso = _G.Yso or _G.yso or {} _G.yso = _G.Yso
Yso = _G.Yso Yso.mode = Yso.mode or {}
local M = Yso.mode
local function _now() if type(getEpoch) == "function" then local t = tonumber(getEpoch()) or os.time() if t > 20000000000 then t = t / 1000 end return t end return os.time() end
local function _norm(s) s = tostring(s or ""):lower() s = s:gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if s == "pvp" then s = "combat" end if s == "pve" or s == "hunt" or s == "hunting" or s == "bashing" then s = "bash" end return s end
local function _echo(msg) if not (M.cfg and M.cfg.echo) then return end if type(cecho) == "function" then cecho("<aquamarine>[Yso] <reset>" .. tostring(msg) .. "<reset>" .. string.char(10)) elseif type(echo) == "function" then echo("[Yso] " .. tostring(msg) .. string.char(10)) end end
M.cfg = M.cfg or { default = "combat", echo = true, }
M.profile = M.profile or { bash = { toggles = { offense = false, affcall = false, debug = false, travel = true, autoloot = true, }, }, combat = { toggles = { offense = true, affcall = true, debug = true, travel = false, autoloot = false, }, }, party = { toggles = { offense = true, affcall = true, debug = true, travel = false, autoloot = false, party = true, }, }, }
if not M.profile.bash and M.profile.hunt then M.profile.bash = M.profile.hunt end if not M.profile.hunt and M.profile.bash then M.profile.hunt = M.profile.bash end
M.state = M.state or _norm(M.cfg.default or "combat") M.state = _norm(M.state) M.last_change = M.last_change or _now() M.last_reason = M.last_reason or "init"
M.party = M.party or { route = "dam", last_change = _now(), last_reason = "init", owns = { dam = false, aff = false }, }
local function _route_norm(r) r = _norm(r) if r == "dmg" then r = "dam" end return r end
local function _gd() return (Yso and Yso.off and Yso.off.oc and (Yso.off.oc.dmg or Yso.off.oc.group_damage)) or nil end
local function _party_apply(reason) local route = _route_norm(M.party and M.party.route or "dam")
if M.state ~= "party" then local gd = _gd() if gd and M.party and M.party.owns and M.party.owns.dam and type(gd.stop) == "function" then pcall(gd.stop) end if M.party and M.party.owns then M.party.owns.dam = false M.party.owns.aff = false end return end
if route == "dam" then local gd = _gd() if gd and gd.state and gd.state.enabled ~= true and type(gd.start) == "function" then pcall(gd.start) end if M.party and M.party.owns then M.party.owns.dam = true M.party.owns.aff = false end _echo('Party route <yellow>dam<reset>: group damage ' .. ((gd and gd.state and gd.state.enabled) and 'ON' or 'requested'))
elseif route == "aff" then local gd = _gd() if gd and M.party and M.party.owns and M.party.owns.dam and type(gd.stop) == "function" then pcall(gd.stop) M.party.owns.dam = false end _echo("Party route <yellow>aff<reset>: (driver not yet implemented)") end end
function M.is_bash() return M.state == "bash" end function M.is_hunt() return M.is_bash() end function M.is_combat() return M.state == "combat" end function M.is_party() return M.state == "party" end
function M.party_route() return _route_norm(M.party and M.party.route or "dam") end
function M.set_party_route(route, reason) route = _route_norm(route) if route ~= "aff" and route ~= "dam" then _echo(("Invalid party route: <yellow>%s<reset> (use aff|dam)"):format(tostring(route))) return false end
local old = M.party_route() if old == route then if M.party then M.party.last_reason = reason or M.party.last_reason end return true end
M.party.route = route M.party.last_change = _now() M.party.last_reason = reason or "manual"
_party_apply("route:"..tostring(reason or "manual"))
if type(raiseEvent) == "function" then raiseEvent("yso.party.route.changed", old, route, M.party.last_reason) end
return true end
function M.echo() if M.is_party() then _echo(("Mode: <yellow>%s<reset> (route: <yellow>%s<reset>)"):format(M.state, M.party_route())) else _echo(("Mode: <yellow>%s<reset>"):format(M.state)) end end
function M.apply_profile(mode) mode = _norm(mode) local p = M.profile and M.profile[mode] if not p or not p.toggles then return end
Yso.toggles = Yso.toggles or {} for k, v in pairs(p.toggles) do local cur = Yso.toggles[k] if cur == nil or type(cur) == "boolean" then Yso.toggles[k] = (v == true) end end end
function M.set(mode, reason) mode = _norm(mode) if mode ~= "bash" and mode ~= "combat" and mode ~= "party" then _echo(("Invalid mode: <yellow>%s<reset> (use bash|combat|party)"):format(tostring(mode))) return false end
local old = M.state if old == mode then M.last_reason = reason or M.last_reason if mode == "party" then _party_apply("mode_noop") end return true end
M.state = mode M.last_change = _now() M.last_reason = reason or "manual"
M.apply_profile(mode)
if mode == "party" then _echo(("Mode set to <yellow>%s<reset> (route: <yellow>%s<reset>)"):format(mode, M.party_route())) else _echo(("Mode set to <yellow>%s<reset>"):format(mode)) end
if type(raiseEvent) == "function" then raiseEvent("yso.mode.changed", old, mode, M.last_reason) end
_party_apply("mode:"..tostring(M.last_reason))
return true end
function M.toggle(reason) if M.is_bash() then return M.set("combat", reason or "toggle") elseif M.is_combat() then return M.set("bash", reason or "toggle") else return false end end
function M.on_engage(reason) return M.set("combat", reason or "engage") end function M.on_disengage(reason) return M.set("combat", reason or "disengage") end
M._alias = M._alias or {} local function _kill_alias(id) if id then pcall(killAlias, id) end end
if type(tempAlias) == "function" then _kill_alias(M._alias.mode) M._alias.mode = tempAlias([[^mode$]], function() if Yso.mode and Yso.mode.echo then Yso.mode.echo() end end)
_kill_alias(M._alias.mode_set) M._alias.mode_set = tempAlias([[^mode\s+(bash|combat|party|hunt)$]], function() Yso.mode.set(matches[2], "alias") end)
_kill_alias(M._alias.hunt) _kill_alias(M._alias.bash) _kill_alias(M._alias.mbash) _kill_alias(M._alias.mhunt) -- NOTE: Do NOT register ^hunt$ here; Legacy uses it for actual bashing automation. M._alias.mbash = tempAlias([[^mbash$]], function() Yso.mode.set("bash", "alias") end) M._alias.mhunt = tempAlias([[^mhunt$]], function() Yso.mode.set("bash", "alias:compat") end)
_kill_alias(M._alias.combat) M._alias.combat = tempAlias([[^combat$]], function() Yso.mode.set("combat", "alias") end)
_kill_alias(M._alias.party) M._alias.party = tempAlias([[^party(?:\s+(aff|dam))?$]], function() local r = matches[2] if r and r ~= "" then Yso.mode.set("party", "alias") Yso.mode.set_party_route(r, "alias") else Yso.mode.set("party", "alias") end end)
_kill_alias(M._alias.partyroute) M._alias.partyroute = tempAlias([[^partyroute\s+(aff|dam)$]], function() Yso.mode.set_party_route(matches[2], "alias") end)
_kill_alias(M._alias.mt) M._alias.mt = tempAlias([[^mt$]], function() Yso.mode.toggle("alias") end) end
M._tip_shown = M._tip_shown or false if (not M._tip_shown) and type(cecho) == "function" then M._tip_shown = true cecho("<aquamarine>[Yso] <reset>Tip: type <white>party<reset> to use the group-damage route (default: <white>party dam<reset>)."..string.char(10)) end
--========================================================--

Script.name: Yso_mode_autoswitch.lua
Script.script:
--========================================================-- -- yso_mode_autoswitch.lua (DROP-IN) -- Purpose: -- â€¢ Auto-switch Yso.mode between bash/combat using: -- 1) Duel/Spar start/end lines (deterministic) -- 2) Aggression cooldown line (fallback) -- 3) PvP contact heuristics via gmcp.Room.Players + combat text -- -- Notes: -- â€¢ Does NOT require you to manually type "cooldowns", but if you do, -- it will parse "Aggression: X minutes and Y seconds." automatically. -- â€¢ Includes a "sniffer" that records lines containing duel/spar so you -- can identify the exact start/end messages from your own output. -- -- Where to place: -- â€¢ Load AFTER yso_modes.lua (recommended), but safe standalone. --========================================================--
_G.Yso = _G.Yso or _G.yso or {} _G.yso = _G.Yso Yso = _G.Yso
Yso.sep = Yso.sep or ";;"
local function _norm_mode(mode) mode = tostring(mode or ""):lower() if mode == "hunt" or mode == "pve" or mode == "hunting" or mode == "bashing" then return "bash" end if mode == "pvp" then return "combat" end return mode end
Yso.mode = Yso.mode or {} do local M = Yso.mode M.cfg = M.cfg or { echo = true } M.state = _norm_mode(M.state or "combat") local function _echo(msg) if not M.cfg.echo then return end if type(cecho) == "function" then cecho("<aquamarine>[Yso] <reset>" .. msg .. "<reset>\n") elseif type(echo) == "function" then echo("[Yso] " .. msg .. "\n") end end M.is_bash = M.is_bash or function() return _norm_mode(M.state) == "bash" end M.is_hunt = M.is_hunt or function() return M.is_bash() end M.is_combat = M.is_combat or function() return _norm_mode(M.state) == "combat" end M.is_party = M.is_party or function() return _norm_mode(M.state) == "party" end M.set = M.set or function(mode, _reason) mode = _norm_mode(mode) if mode ~= "bash" and mode ~= "combat" and mode ~= "party" then return false end if _norm_mode(M.state) ~= mode then M.state = mode _echo(("Mode set to <yellow>%s<reset>"):format(mode)) if type(raiseEvent) == "function" then raiseEvent("yso.mode.changed", nil, mode, _reason or "auto") end end return true end end
Yso.mode.auto = Yso.mode.auto or {} local A = Yso.mode.auto
local function _now() return (type(getEpoch) == "function" and getEpoch()) or os.time() end
local function _echo(msg) if not (Yso.mode and Yso.mode.cfg and Yso.mode.cfg.echo) then return end if type(cecho) == "function" then cecho("<aquamarine>[Yso] <reset>" .. msg .. "<reset>\n") elseif type(echo) == "function" then echo("[Yso] " .. msg .. "\n") end end
A.cfg = A.cfg or { debug = false, sniff = true, sniff_max = 40, contact_hold = 20, use_aggression = true, idle_mode = "combat", -- default idle/off state; do not auto-enter bash preserve_manual_bash = true, -- explicit mbash/mhunt stays sticky until changed }
A.state = A.state or { forced = nil, combat_until = 0, room_players = {}, sniff = {}, }
local function _sniff(line) if not A.cfg.sniff then return end local buf = A.state.sniff buf[#buf + 1] = { t = _now(), line = line } while #buf > (A.cfg.sniff_max or 40) do table.remove(buf, 1) end end
function A.dump_sniff() local buf = A.state.sniff _echo(("Sniff buffer (%d lines):"):format(#buf)) for i = 1, #buf do local row = buf[i] _echo(("[%02d] %s"):format(i, row.line)) end end
local function _in_room_players(name) if not name or name == "" then return false end return A.state.room_players[name:lower()] == true end
local function _sync_mode(reason) if Yso.mode and ((type(Yso.mode.is_party)=="function" and Yso.mode.is_party()) or (_norm_mode(Yso.mode.state or "") == "party")) then return end if A.state.forced then if not (Yso.mode.is_combat and Yso.mode.is_combat()) then Yso.mode.set("combat", reason or "forced") if A.cfg.debug then _echo("Auto: forced combat ("..A.state.forced.kind..")") end end return end
if _now() < (A.state.combat_until or 0) then if not (Yso.mode.is_combat and Yso.mode.is_combat()) then Yso.mode.set("combat", reason or "timer") if A.cfg.debug then _echo("Auto: combat (timer)") end end else local in_bash = false if Yso.mode.is_bash then in_bash = Yso.mode.is_bash() elseif Yso.mode.is_hunt then in_bash = Yso.mode.is_hunt() else in_bash = _norm_mode(Yso.mode.state or "") == "bash" end
if in_bash and A.cfg.preserve_manual_bash ~= false then if A.cfg.debug then _echo("Auto: idle (preserving manual bash)") end return end
local idle_mode = _norm_mode(A.cfg.idle_mode or "combat") if idle_mode == "" or idle_mode == "hold" or idle_mode == "none" then if A.cfg.debug then _echo("Auto: idle (holding current mode)") end return end if idle_mode ~= "combat" and idle_mode ~= "bash" then idle_mode = "combat" end
local cur = _norm_mode((Yso.mode and Yso.mode.state) or "") if cur ~= idle_mode then Yso.mode.set(idle_mode, reason or "idle") if A.cfg.debug then _echo("Auto: "..idle_mode.." (idle)") end end end end
function A.force_combat(kind, opponent, reason) A.state.forced = { kind = kind or "duel", opponent = opponent or "", since = _now(), reason = reason or "line" } _sync_mode("force:"..tostring(kind)) _echo(("Auto: <yellow>%s<reset> started%s"):format( tostring(kind or "duel"), (opponent and opponent ~= "") and (" vs <yellow>"..opponent.."<reset>") or "" )) end
function A.clear_force(reason) if A.state.forced then _echo(("Auto: <yellow>%s<reset> ended%s"):format( tostring(A.state.forced.kind), (A.state.forced.opponent and A.state.forced.opponent ~= "") and (" vs <yellow>"..A.state.forced.opponent.."<reset>") or "" )) end A.state.forced = nil A.state.combat_until = 0 _sync_mode(reason or "force_end") end
function A.bump_combat(seconds, reason) seconds = tonumber(seconds or 0) or 0 if seconds <= 0 then return end local untilt = _now() + seconds if untilt > (A.state.combat_until or 0) then A.state.combat_until = untilt end _sync_mode(reason or "bump") end
A._eh = A._eh or {}
local function _update_room_players() local set = {} local pkt = gmcp and gmcp.Room and gmcp.Room.Players if type(pkt) == "table" then for _, row in ipairs(pkt) do if type(row) == "table" and row.name then set[tostring(row.name):lower()] = true elseif type(row) == "string" then set[row:lower()] = true end end end A.state.room_players = set end
local function _safe(fn) return function(...) local ok, err = pcall(fn, ...) if not ok and A.cfg.debug then _echo("Auto ERR: "..tostring(err)) end end end
local function _kill_ae(id) if id then killAnonymousEventHandler(id) end end _kill_ae(A._eh.room_players) A._eh.room_players = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Room.Players", _safe(_update_room_players))
local function _parse_aggression(line) local mins = line:match("(%d+)%s+minutes?") local secs = line:match("(%d+)%s+seconds?") mins = tonumber(mins or 0) or 0 secs = tonumber(secs or 0) or 0 return mins * 60 + secs end
local function _lower(s) return tostring(s or ""):lower() end
local function _looks_like_duel_start(s) s = _lower(s) return s:find("duel", 1, true) and (s:find("accept", 1, true) or s:find("accepted", 1, true) or s:find("begins", 1, true) or s:find("has begun", 1, true)) and not s:find("declin", 1, true) end
local function _looks_like_duel_end(s) s = _lower(s) return s:find("duel", 1, true) and (s:find("has ended", 1, true) or s:find("is over", 1, true) or s:find("ends", 1, true) or s:find("conclud", 1, true) or s:find("you have won", 1, true) or s:find("you have lost", 1, true)) end
local function _looks_like_spar_start(s) s = _lower(s) return (s:find("spar", 1, true) or s:find("sparring", 1, true)) and (s:find("accept", 1, true) or s:find("accepted", 1, true) or s:find("begins", 1, true) or s:find("has begun", 1, true) or s:find("agreed", 1, true)) end
local function _looks_like_spar_end(s) s = _lower(s) return (s:find("spar", 1, true) or s:find("sparring", 1, true)) and (s:find("has ended", 1, true) or s:find("is over", 1, true) or s:find("ends", 1, true) or s:find("conclud", 1, true)) end
local function _extract_name_near_you(s) local a = s:match("([A-Z][%w_%-']+) challenges you") if a then return a end local b = s:match("you challenge ([A-Z][%w_%-']+)") if b then return b end local c = s:match("([A-Z][%w_%-']+) accepts your") if c then return c end local d = s:match("you accept ([A-Z][%w_%-']+)'s") if d then return d end return nil end
A._tr = A._tr or {} local function _kill_tr(id) if id then killTrigger(id) end end
_kill_tr(A._tr.duel_spar_sniff) A._tr.duel_spar_sniff = tempRegexTrigger([[.*]], _safe(function() local line = getCurrentLine() or "" local low = _lower(line)
if low:find("duel", 1, true) or low:find("spar", 1, true) or low:find("aggression:", 1, true) then _sniff(line) end
if _looks_like_duel_start(line) then A.force_combat("duel", _extract_name_near_you(line), "duel_start") return end if _looks_like_spar_start(line) then A.force_combat("spar", _extract_name_near_you(line), "spar_start") return end if _looks_like_duel_end(line) then A.clear_force("duel_end") return end if _looks_like_spar_end(line) then A.clear_force("spar_end") return end
if A.cfg.use_aggression and low:find("aggression:", 1, true) == 1 then local secs = _parse_aggression(line) if secs > 0 then A.bump_combat(secs, "aggression") else _sync_mode("aggression_zero") end return end
local who = line:match("^([A-Z][%w_%-']+) .-") if who and _in_room_players(who) then local me = (gmcp and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Status and gmcp.Char.Status.name) or nil if not me or who:lower() ~= tostring(me):lower() then A.bump_combat(A.cfg.contact_hold or 20, "pvp_contact") end end end))
_sync_mode("init") --========================================================--

Script.name: yso_escape_button.lua
Script.script:
--========================================================-- -- yso_escape_button.lua (DROP-IN) [REFRESHED for current Yso] -- Purpose: -- â€¢ F5 â€œescapeâ€ handler for Achaea (Yso namespace) -- â€¢ Respects current Yso command separator (Yso.sep; default ";;") -- â€¢ Universe TOUCH defaults to Newthera -- â€¢ Uses Legacy affliction tracking (Legacy.Curing.Affs) when present -- â€¢ Uses Yso.queue.*_clear (or addclear) when available; otherwise sends directly -- -- Priority: -- 1) Universe (touch if up; else fling + touch) -- 2) Hermit (only if activated/ready) -- 3) Pathfinder HOME -- 4) Astral fallback (optional) -- -- Safety gates: -- â€¢ NEVER fires if prone/fallen OR paralysis/paresis -- â€¢ Universe/Hermit additionally require NOT webbed/bound and at least one unbroken arm -- â€¢ Only fires if HP% < threshold OR MP% < threshold --========================================================--
_G.Yso = _G.Yso or _G.yso or {} _G.yso = _G.Yso local Yso = _G.Yso
Yso.sep = Yso.sep or ";;"
Yso.escape = Yso.escape or {} local E = Yso.escape
-- ---------------- configuration (non-destructive defaults) ---------------- E.cfg = E.cfg or {}
if E.cfg.sep == nil or E.cfg.sep == "" then E.cfg.sep = (Yso and Yso.sep) or ";;" end
if E.cfg.echo == nil then E.cfg.echo = true end if E.cfg.threshold_pct == nil then E.cfg.threshold_pct = 75 end
-- Default Universe destination: Newthera (closest â€œsafe cityâ€ target per your note) if E.cfg.universe_touch == nil or E.cfg.universe_touch == "" then E.cfg.universe_touch = "newthera" end
if E.cfg.hermit_tag == nil then E.cfg.hermit_tag = "" end if E.cfg.astral_cmd == nil then E.cfg.astral_cmd = "" end
-- ---------------- runtime state ---------------- E.state = E.state or { uni_pending = false, uni_up = false, uni_up_since = 0, uni_last_duration = 0,
hermit_ready = false, last_press = 0, }
-- ---------------- tiny helpers ---------------- local function _now() return (type(getEpoch) == "function" and getEpoch()) or os.time() end
local function _vitals() return (gmcp and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Vitals) or {} end
local function _pct(cur, max) cur, max = tonumber(cur or 0), tonumber(max or 0) if max <= 0 then return 0 end return (cur / max) * 100 end
local function _current_class() if Yso and Yso.classinfo and type(Yso.classinfo.get) == "function" then return Yso.classinfo.get() end local cls = gmcp and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Status and gmcp.Char.Status.class if (type(cls) ~= "string" or cls == "") and type(Yso.class) == "string" then cls = Yso.class end return tostring(cls or "") end
local function _is_occultist() if Yso and Yso.classinfo and type(Yso.classinfo.is_occultist) == "function" then return Yso.classinfo.is_occultist() end return _current_class() == "Occultist" end
local function _cecho(msg) if E.cfg.echo and type(cecho) == "function" then cecho("<aquamarine>[Yso] " .. tostring(msg) .. "<reset>\n") end end
local function _send_line(cmd) if not cmd or cmd == "" then return end if type(send) == "function" then send(cmd, false) end end
-- Split and send a compound payload using the configured separator local function _send_compound(body) body = tostring(body or "") if body == "" then return end
local sep = (E.cfg and E.cfg.sep) or (Yso and Yso.sep) or ";;" local parts = {} local idx = 1
while true do local a, b = body:find(sep, idx, true) local part = a and body:sub(idx, a - 1) or body:sub(idx) part = part:gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if part ~= "" then parts[#parts+1] = part end if not a then break end idx = b + 1 end
for i = 1, #parts do _send_line(parts[i]) end end
-- Prefer Yso.queue *clear wrappers if present; otherwise send directly. local function _queue_clear(qtype, payload) payload = tostring(payload or "") if payload == "" then return end
local Q = Yso and Yso.queue or nil if type(Q) == "table" then -- Prefer sugar: eq_clear / bal_clear / eqbal_clear, etc. local fn = (qtype == "eq" and Q.eq_clear) or (qtype == "bal" and Q.bal_clear) or (qtype == "eqbal" and Q.eqbal_clear) or nil
if type(fn) == "function" then fn(payload) return end
-- Fallback: addclear(qtype, payload) if type(Q.addclear) == "function" then Q.addclear(qtype, payload) return end end
-- Last resort: client-side split and send _send_compound(payload) end
-- ---------------- affliction source: Legacy-first ---------------- local function _legacy_affs() if type(Legacy) == "table" and type(Legacy.Curing) == "table" and type(Legacy.Curing.Affs) == "table" then return Legacy.Curing.Affs end return nil end
local function _yso_affs() if type(Yso) == "table" and type(Yso.affs) == "table" then return Yso.affs end return nil end
local function _has_aff(key) key = tostring(key or "") if key == "" then return false end
local L = _legacy_affs() if L then if L[key] then return true end local lk = key:lower() if lk ~= key and L[lk] then return true end end
local Y = _yso_affs() if Y then if Y[key] then return true end local lk = key:lower() if lk ~= key and Y[lk] then return true end end
return false end
local function _has_any(list) for i = 1, #list do if _has_aff(list[i]) then return true end end return false end
local function _vitals_prone() local v = _vitals() local pos = tostring(v.position or ""):lower() return (pos:find("prone", 1, true) ~= nil) end
local function _both_arms_broken() -- GMCP/Legacy-style keys (plus a couple common synonyms) local l = _has_any({ "left_arm_broken", "leftarmbroken", "left_arm_mangled", "mangled_left_arm" }) local r = _has_any({ "right_arm_broken", "rightarmbroken", "right_arm_mangled", "mangled_right_arm" }) return l and r end
local function _blocked_global() -- All routes fail while prone/paralyzed (per your design notes) if _has_any({ "paralysis", "paralyzed", "paresis" }) then return true end if _has_any({ "prone", "fallen" }) or _vitals_prone() then return true end return false end
local function _blocked_for_cards() -- Universe/Hermit: must not be webbed/bound, and must have at least one usable arm (not BOTH broken) if _has_any({ "webbed", "bound" }) then return true end if _both_arms_broken() then return true end return false end
-- ---------------- Universe/Hermit tracking triggers ---------------- E._trig = E._trig or {} local function _killTrig(id) if id then killTrigger(id) end end
-- Universe: fling starts pending _killTrig(E._trig.uni_fling) E._trig.uni_fling = tempRegexTrigger( [[^You fling the card at the ground, and it vanishes into the earth in a spark of magic\.$]], function() E.state.uni_pending = true end )
-- Universe: map rises (up) _killTrig(E._trig.uni_up) E._trig.uni_up = tempRegexTrigger( [[^A shimmering, translucent image rises up before you, its glittering surface displaying ]], function() E.state.uni_pending = false E.state.uni_up = true E.state.uni_up_since = _now() end )
-- Universe: map folds (down) â€” record duration _killTrig(E._trig.uni_down) E._trig.uni_down = tempRegexTrigger( [[^The shimmering map folds up and vanishes into the ether\.$]], function() if E.state.uni_up and (E.state.uni_up_since or 0) > 0 then E.state.uni_last_duration = _now() - E.state.uni_up_since end E.state.uni_pending = false E.state.uni_up = false E.state.uni_up_since = 0 end )
-- Hermit: activated (ready) _killTrig(E._trig.hermit_activate) E._trig.hermit_activate = tempRegexTrigger( [[^You activate the hermit card.*$]], function() E.state.hermit_ready = true end )
-- Hermit: used (no longer ready) _killTrig(E._trig.hermit_used) E._trig.hermit_used = tempRegexTrigger( [[^You fling the hermit card at the ground.*$]], function() E.state.hermit_ready = false end )
-- ---------------- main entry ---------------- function E.press() if not _is_occultist() then return end
-- threshold gate local v = _vitals() local hp_pct = _pct(v.hp, v.maxhp) local mp_pct = _pct(v.mp, v.maxmp)
local thr = tonumber(E.cfg.threshold_pct or 75) or 75 if not (hp_pct < thr or mp_pct < thr) then return end
-- global blockers if _blocked_global() then return end
local sep = (E.cfg and E.cfg.sep) or (Yso and Yso.sep) or ";;" local touch_to = tostring(E.cfg.universe_touch or "newthera") if touch_to == "" then touch_to = "newthera" end
-- 1) Universe if touch_to ~= "" and not _blocked_for_cards() then if E.state.uni_up then _queue_clear("bal", ("touch %s"):format(touch_to)) else -- fling consumes BAL; touch will either execute after or ride the server queue depending on separator behavior _queue_clear("bal", ("fling universe at ground%s touch %s"):format(sep, touch_to)) end E.state.last_press = _now() return end
-- 2) Hermit (only if activated) if E.state.hermit_ready and not _blocked_for_cards() then local tag = tostring(E.cfg.hermit_tag or "") if tag ~= "" then _queue_clear("bal", ("fling hermit at ground %s"):format(tag)) else _queue_clear("bal", "fling hermit at ground") end E.state.last_press = _now() return end
-- 3) Pathfinder HOME _queue_clear("eq", "order pathfinder home") E.state.last_press = _now() return
-- 4) Astral fallback (optional; left disabled by return above unless you reorder priorities) -- local astral = tostring(E.cfg.astral_cmd or "") -- if astral ~= "" then -- _queue_clear("eq", astral) -- E.state.last_press = _now() -- end end
_cecho(string.format( "Escape button loaded: sep='%s', universe_touch='%s'", tostring(E.cfg.sep or ""), tostring(E.cfg.universe_touch or "") )) --========================================================--

Script.name: Yso_Alert_Radiance helper
Radiance event
Script.script:
-- Auto-exported from Mudlet package script: Radiance event -- DO NOT EDIT IN XML; edit this file instead.
--========================================================-- -- RadianceAlert_Helper_Event -- â€¢ Provides: Yso.radianceAlert.fire(stage, who, msg) -- â€¢ Raises: raiseEvent("YsoRadiance", stage, who, msg) -- â€¢ Plays: C:/Windows/Media/Alarm01.wav (all stages 1-4) -- â€¢ Prints: HASH banner (deferred) --========================================================--
Yso = Yso or {} Yso.radianceAlert = Yso.radianceAlert or {}
local RA = Yso.radianceAlert
RA.cfg = RA.cfg or { SOUND = "C:/Windows/Media/Alarm01.wav", WIDTH = 80, PAD_BEFORE = 1, PAD_AFTER = 1,
-- Toggle these if needed do_sound = true, do_banner = true, do_event = true, }
local function center(line) local w = tonumber(RA.cfg.WIDTH or 80) or 80 line = tostring(line or "") if #line >= w then return line end local pad = math.floor((w - #line) / 2) if pad < 0 then pad = 0 end return string.rep(" ", pad) .. line end
local function playSound() if not RA.cfg.do_sound then return end local file = RA.cfg.SOUND or "" if file == "" then return end
if type(playSoundFile) == "function" then pcall(playSoundFile, file) elseif type(playSound) == "function" then pcall(playSound, file) end end
local function hashBanner(stage) local banners = { [1] = { "########################################################", "# RADIANCE (T-4) #", "# Sparks in your mind. Get ready. #", "########################################################", }, [2] = { "########################################################", "# RADIANCE (T-3) #", "# Warmth begins to fill your body. MOVE. #", "########################################################", }, [3] = { "########################################################", "# RADIANCE (T-2) #", "# White arcs across your vision. MOVE NOW. #", "########################################################", }, [4] = { "########################################################", "############### RADIANCE (T-1) ######################", "############### IMMINENT ###################", "############### ESCAPE NOW!! ###################", "########################################################", }, } return banners[stage] end
local function banner(stage) if not RA.cfg.do_banner then return end local lines = hashBanner(stage) if not lines then return end
-- Defer so it prints cleanly (not glued to the trigger line). tempTimer(0, function() for _=1,(RA.cfg.PAD_BEFORE or 0) do cecho("\n") end
local color = "<yellow>" if stage >= 3 then color = "<red>" end
for _,ln in ipairs(lines) do cecho(color .. center(ln) .. "\n") end
for _=1,(RA.cfg.PAD_AFTER or 0) do cecho("\n") end end) end
function RA.fire(stage, who, msg) who = who or "Monk" msg = msg or ""
-- Raise event FIRST so your automation can react instantly. if RA.cfg.do_event and type(raiseEvent) == "function" then raiseEvent("YsoRadiance", stage, who, msg) end
-- Only stage 1-4 are the kill-telegraph lines you want loud. if stage >= 1 and stage <= 4 then playSound() banner(stage) end end

Script.name: Yso_hunt_mode_upkeep
Script.script:
-- Auto-exported from Mudlet package script: Yso_hunt_mode_upkeep -- DO NOT EDIT IN XML; edit this file instead.
--========================================================-- -- yso_hunt_mode_upkeep.lua (DROP-IN) -- Bash mode upkeep + Orb Defense Controller + Bash Shielding -- -- Key fixes: -- â€¢ Safe default-merge into existing M.cfg / M.state so reloading wonâ€™t nil-index. -- â€¢ Occultist-only gating: no entourage/entity/orb/pathfinder upkeep on non-Occultist classes. -- â€¢ Bash-mode naming: Yso bash mode replaces the old hunt-mode label. -- -- Bash shielding: -- â€¢ If HP% <= 50 and shield not active -> touch shield + cecho: -- <aquamarine>[CURING:] <yellow>(SHIELDING UP!) -- â€¢ Tracks shield UP/DOWN + generalized â€œtranslucent hammer ... smashesâ€ (any denizen) --========================================================--
